title: CFTC backs crypto perpetual contracts, issues advisory on 24/7 trading
summary: CFTC backs crypto perpetual contracts, issues advisory on 24/7 trading
briefing: The CFTC issued notices affecting platforms seeking to offer cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts, including a no-action position for Coinbase and approval for Kalshi.

title: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
summary: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
briefing: The outage was caused by the same network update software bug that disrupted the protocol on Thursday, which resulted in nearly six hours of downtime.

title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
summary: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
briefing: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.

title: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K
summary: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K
briefing: Bitcoin saw its lowest levels since the middle of April as BTC price action continued ot diverge from thriving US stock markets.

title: Ex-Celsius CEO files motion to vacate sentence after lawyers withdraw
summary: Ex-Celsius CEO files motion to vacate sentence after lawyers withdraw
briefing: Former CEO Alex Mashinsky filed documents seeking to vacate his 12-year sentence, which included claims involving FTX and a “hostile takeover” by a former Celsius executive, who was sentenced to time served.

title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
summary: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
briefing: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
summary: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
briefing: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a nine-day outflow streak totaling $2.84 billion, surpassing an eight-session outflow run in February 2025.

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
summary: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
briefing: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. has "outright grabbed" roughly $1 billion worth of cryptocurrencies from Iran via seizures.

title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Files to Have 12-Year Crypto Fraud Sentence Vacated
summary: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Files to Have 12-Year Crypto Fraud Sentence Vacated
briefing: Celsius founder and former CEO Alex Mashinsky hopes to have his prison sentence vacated, claiming a legal conflict tied to Sam Bankman-Fried.

title: Coinbase Becomes First US Exchange Allowed to Offer Global Crypto Perps Trading
summary: Coinbase Becomes First US Exchange Allowed to Offer Global Crypto Perps Trading
briefing: Coinbase can offer U.S. customers access to offshore crypto perpetual futures, a risky form of leveraged crypto trading, the CFTC said Friday.

title: Lenovo Stock Doubles in May on AI Server Boom—Best Month in 27 Years
summary: Lenovo Stock Doubles in May on AI Server Boom—Best Month in 27 Years
briefing: The world's biggest PC maker surged 109% in May after AI revenue hit 38% of quarterly sales. Goldman Sachs more than doubled its target.

title: You Can Now Read the US Constitution via the Bitcoin Blockchain
summary: You Can Now Read the US Constitution via the Bitcoin Blockchain
briefing: One of America's most important historical documents will forever be inscribed on a Bitcoin block, thanks to someone's $83 transaction fee.

title: NYSE Parent Isn't 'Freaked Out' by Hyperliquid—It's Learning From the Crypto Perps Giant
summary: NYSE Parent Isn't 'Freaked Out' by Hyperliquid—It's Learning From the Crypto Perps Giant
briefing: Intercontinental Exchange CEO Jeffrey Sprecher said his company and Hyperliquid are learning from each other as crypto perps gain ground.

title: AI Models Can’t Agree on Basic Facts Most of the Time, Study Shows
summary: AI Models Can’t Agree on Basic Facts Most of the Time, Study Shows
briefing: A new study gave five frontier AI models 1,000 real-world claims to fact-check. They disagreed on 67% of them.

title: Wintermute Is Providing Liquidity on Kalshi and Polymarket, Linking Two Giants
summary: Wintermute Is Providing Liquidity on Kalshi and Polymarket, Linking Two Giants
briefing: Wintermute is providing liquidity on the two biggest prediction markets, linking flows for both firms, according to a source familiar with the matter.
